subcodes.first_line: The world hath been encompassed by the dark dust of tyranny, and they have arisen with an oppression that hath neither likeness nor parallel [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: عالم را غبار تیره ظلم احاطه نموده و بظلمی قیام نموده اند که شبه و مثل نداشته و
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @justice and wrath of God, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @consolation and comfort
